name: Becker Community Center
description: Becker Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Becker, MN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Becker HS tennis courts
description: Becker HS tennis courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Becker, MN. There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Elk River YMCA
description: Elk River YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elk River, MN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Guardian Angels
description: Guardian Angels is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elk River, MN. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The court is private.

name: Highlands Park
description: Highlands Park is a place to play pickleball in Elk River, MN. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. Reservations are not available.

name: Hudson Woods Park
description: Hudson Woods Park is a place to play pickleball in Big Lake, MN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Orono Park
description: Come play pickleball at Orono Park in Elk River, MN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Pickle Paradise
description: Pickle Paradise is a place to play pickleball in Elk River, MN. There are 7 indoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, youth programming, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
fees: Members only — Free Membership through Court Reserve Required to book courts

name: Prairie Park
description: Come play pickleball at Prairie Park in Elk River, MN! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
